items.title: Retirement: HC-series Azure Virtual Machines will be retired on May 31, 2027
items.impact: HC-series VMs retire; users of listed HC sizes must migrate
items.action: Migrate affected HC VMs to current supported alternatives

items.title: Retirement: HBv2-series Azure Virtual Machines will be retired on May 31, 2027
items.impact: HBv2-series VMs retire; users of listed HBv2 sizes must migrate
items.action: Migrate affected HBv2 VMs to current supported alternatives

items.title: Retirement: NP-series Azure Virtual Machines will be retired on May 31, 2027
items.impact: NP-series VMs retire; users of listed GPU VM sizes must migrate
items.action: Move NP-series workloads to supported Azure GPU VM sizes

items.title: Retirement: Emissions Impact Dashboard for Azure
items.impact: Emissions Impact Dashboard for Azure retires; Power BI dashboard users affected
items.action: Export dashboard data and plan alternate reporting before retirement

items.title: v1.15.0-beta1
items.impact: Terraform adds deprecated attribute warnings for variables and outputs

items.title: Release Notes - 2026-03-05
items.impact: AKS Flatcar Container Linux preview retires; AKS users must switch OS
items.action: Transition AKS nodes from Flatcar preview to a supported alternative

items.title: After Ingress NGINX: Migrating to Application Gateway for Containers
items.impact: Ingress NGINX upstream ends in March 2026; AKS users must migrate
items.action: Plan migration to Application Gateway for Containers or other ingress

items.title: Retirement: Azure VMware Solution AV36P and AV52 node retirement on June 30, 2029
items.impact: AVS AV36P and AV52 nodes retire; Azure VMware Solution users affected
items.action: Review RI expirations and plan migration off AV36P/AV52 nodes

items.title: Retirement: Support for Windows Server 2016 Marketplace images on Azure Batch pools will end on January 12, 2027
items.impact: Azure Batch drops Windows Server 2016 Marketplace images for pools
items.action: Move Batch pools to supported Windows Server images before deadline

items.title: Retirement: Migration of Azure Batch Low-Priority VMs to Spot VMs in early March
items.impact: Batch Low-Priority VMs already retired; system migration to Spot VMs started
items.action: Validate Batch workloads on Spot VMs and update any VM assumptions

items.title: Retirement: End of life reminder of NVv3 and NVv4-series Azure virtual machine in Azure Batch pools
items.impact: Azure Batch support for NVv3/NVv4 VM pools ends; GPU users affected
items.action: Migrate Batch pools off NVv3/NVv4 to supported GPU VM series

items.title: Retirement: Flatcar Container Linux for AKS (preview)
items.impact: Flatcar Container Linux for AKS preview retires; AKS users affected
items.action: Transition from Flatcar Container Linux to a supported AKS option

items.title: Release 2026-02-08
items.impact: AKS Windows Server 2019 retired; no new node images or support
items.action: Upgrade AKS Windows node pools to Windows Server 2022 or later

items.title: Retirement: Azure Policy faster enforcement and retirement of login/logout workaround
items.impact: Azure Policy retires login/logout workaround due to faster enforcement
items.action: Stop relying on login/logout workaround for policy enforcement

items.title: v1.15.0-alpha20260304
items.impact: Terraform adds deprecated attribute warnings for variables and outputs

items.title: Retirement: Managed NGINX Ingress with Application Routing Add-on Retiring November 2026
items.impact: Managed NGINX ingress add-on support ends; AKS ingress users affected
items.action: Migrate from Application Routing NGINX add-on to a supported ingress

items.title: Before You Migrate: Five Surprising Ingress-NGINX Behaviors You Need to Know
items.impact: Kubernetes retires Ingress-NGINX in March 2026; cluster operators affected
items.action: Migrate off Ingress-NGINX to a supported ingress controller now

items.title: The Dongle Died at Midnight – WinForms Agent Saved my German Mom’s Business Trip
items.impact: No deprecation or retirement announcement relevant to Azure/GitHub

items.title: Retirement: Windows Server Annual Channel (preview)
items.impact: AKS Windows Server Annual Channel preview retires; users must switch
items.action: Transition AKS Windows nodes to LTSC before retirement

items.title: v1.15.0-alpha20260218
items.impact: Terraform adds deprecated attribute warnings for variables and outputs

items.title: TFVC Remove Existing Obsolete Policies ASAP
items.impact: Legacy TFVC check-in policies deprecated; Azure DevOps TFVC users affected
items.action: Replace obsolete TFVC check-in policies with supported equivalents

items.title: v1.15.0-alpha20260204
items.impact: Terraform adds deprecated attribute warnings for variables and outputs

items.title: Retirement: Azure Front Door and Azure CDN profiles will end support for DHE cipher suites on April 1, 2026
items.impact: AFD and Azure CDN end DHE cipher support; clients using weak ciphers break
items.action: Update clients and TLS configs to avoid deprecated DHE cipher suites

items.title: Retirement: "Send data to Event Hubs & Storage (Preview)" retiring July 31, 2026
items.impact: VM client data to Event Hubs/Storage preview retires; users must migrate
items.action: Stop using preview feature and move to supported data collection options

items.title: Ingress NGINX: Statement from the Kubernetes Steering and Security Response Committees
items.impact: Kubernetes retires Ingress NGINX in March 2026; operators affected
items.action: Migrate off Ingress NGINX immediately to a supported alternative

items.title: Retirement: Support for Python 3.10 ends on October 1, 2026 – upgrade your Azure Functions apps to Python 3.13
items.impact: Azure Functions ends Python 3.10 support; Python apps must upgrade
items.action: Upgrade Azure Functions apps from Python 3.10 to Python 3.13

items.title: Retirement: Azure SQL Elastic query - Shard_Map_Manager mode
items.impact: Azure SQL Elastic query Shard_Map_Manager mode loses support for existing users
items.action: Plan migration off Shard_Map_Manager mode before support ends

items.title: Announcing Ingress2Gateway 1.0: Your Path to Gateway API
items.impact: Ingress-NGINX retires in March 2026; Kubernetes ingress users must migrate
items.action: Migrate from Ingress-NGINX to Gateway API immediately

items.title: Retirement: Azure Sphere will be retired on July 31, 2031
items.impact: Azure Sphere retires; devices lose updates, support, and DAA cert issuance
items.action: Create a long-term migration plan away from Azure Sphere

items.title: SQL code analysis in VS Code: Configure rules without editing your project file
items.impact: VS Code SQL analysis can detect deprecated syntax; no announced retirement timeline

items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Application routing with meshless Istio in AKS
items.impact: AKS ingress-nginx is deprecated; AKS operators need a supported ingress alternative.
items.action: Plan migration from ingress-nginx to Application Routing with Meshless Istio.

items.title: Gemini 3 Pro deprecated
items.impact: Gemini 3 Pro is deprecated across all GitHub Copilot experiences.
items.action: Switch Copilot workflows to a supported model immediately.

items.title: Retirement: Deprecation of sidecar for remote-write for Azure Monitor managed service for Prometheus
items.impact: Azure Monitor Prometheus sidecar remote-write deprecated for self-hosted collectors
items.action: Migrate to self-hosted OpenTelemetry Collector remote write to Azure Monitor

items.title: Retirement: Azure Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL will retire on March 31, 2029
items.impact: Azure Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL retires; users must move to Elastic Cluster
items.action: Plan and migrate to Azure Database for PostgreSQL Elastic Cluster

items.title: Upcoming deprecation of Claude Sonnet 4 in GitHub Copilot
items.impact: Claude Sonnet 4 removed from all GitHub Copilot experiences for all Copilot users
items.action: Switch workflows to the suggested alternative model before 2026-05-01

items.title: Retirement: External Data Import & Data Connections in Azure Machine Learning will be retired on September 30, 2026
items.impact: Azure ML external data import and data connections preview retire for Azure ML users
items.action: Migrate off these preview features before 2026-09-30

items.title: Retirement: Manually registered Azure VPN Clients for ​Azure Government and ​Microsoft Azure operated by 21Vianet clouds will be retired on March 31, 2029
items.impact: Manual Azure VPN client registration retires for Gov and 21Vianet Entra ID P2S users
items.action: Move to the recommended registration method before 2029-03-31

items.title: Retirement: Service Fabric support for Windows Server 2022 ends on March 31, 2027 - upgrade to Windows Server 2025
items.impact: Service Fabric on Windows Server 2022 loses support for all clusters.
items.action: Upgrade Service Fabric clusters to Windows Server 2025 before 2027-03-31.

items.title: Retirement: Service Fabric support for Windows Server 2019 ends on March 31, 2027 - upgrade to Windows Server 2025
items.impact: Service Fabric on Windows Server 2019 loses support for all clusters.
items.action: Upgrade Service Fabric clusters to Windows Server 2025 before 2027-03-31.

items.title: Retirement: Select Azure AI Language Features
items.impact: Eight Azure AI Language features retire; users of those features are affected.
items.action: Identify usage and migrate affected Azure AI Language workloads before retirement.

items.title: v1.15.0-beta2
items.impact: Terraform adds deprecated variable/output warnings; no product retirement announced.

items.title: Model Upgrade and Migration Strategy for Microsoft Foundry
items.impact: Foundry model versions retire over time; customers must plan ongoing app migrations
items.action: Establish model upgrade testing and migration process for deployed apps

items.title: Retirement: Python support for Azure App Service and Azure Functions on Windows will be retired on March 31, 2027
items.impact: Python apps on App Service/Functions on Windows stop running after retirement
items.action: Migrate Python apps off Windows hosting before 2027-03-31

items.title: Retirement: AzureDnsEndpoints for Azure storage accounts will be retired March 2027
items.impact: AzureDnsZone endpoints for Blob storage retire; preview users are affected
items.action: Move new and existing Blob accounts to Standard endpoints

items.title: GPT-5.1 Codex, GPT-5.1-Codex-Max, and GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini deprecated
items.impact: GPT-5.1 Codex models removed from all GitHub Copilot experiences.
items.action: Migrate Copilot usage to supported replacement models immediately.
